English Words: This is really a good [place] to study.
Chinese Sentence: 这真是个学习的好[地方]

English Words: The [local] government is building a new road.
Chinese Sentence: [地方]政府正在修建一条新路。

English Words: There is no [room/space] on the bookshelf for more books.
Chinese Sentence: 书架上没有放书的[地方]了。

English Words: He has many [aspects/points] that are worth my learning.
Chinese Sentence: 他有很多值得我学习的[地方]。

English Words: He is very rich, [but/however] he is very low-key.
Chinese Sentence: 他很有钱，不过人很低调。

English Words: I was [only/just] joking.
Chinese Sentence: 我不过是开个玩笑

English Words: He is [introducing] the startup process of this software to the majority of his new colleagues.
Chinese Sentence: 他正在向多数新同事介绍这款软件的开机流程。

English Words: His [introduction] was very detailed, but the network security issues mentioned in it sounded very scary.
Chinese Sentence: 他的介绍非常详细，但其中提到的网络安全问题听起来很可怕。

English Words: Something happened over there; let's [go over] and take a look.
Chinese Sentence: 那边出了点事，我们过去看看吧。

English Words: Don’t always live in [the past]; we need to look toward the future.
Chinese Sentence: 不要总是活在过去，我们要向未来看。

English Words: Please send me the [location/venue] of the meeting.
Chinese Sentence: 请把会议的[地点]发给我。

English Words: When in a relationship, we should consider things more from the [other person's] perspective.
Chinese Sentence: 谈恋爱的时候，我们要多站在对方的角度考虑问题。

English Words: If the [other party] does not agree to this price, we may need to renegotiate.
Chinese Sentence: 如果对方不同意这个价格，我们可能需要重新谈判。

English Words: The [opponent's] defense is very strong; it's hard for us to find a breakthrough.
Chinese Sentence: 对方的防守非常强，我们很难找到突破口。

English Words: I don’t know how [to drive]
Chinese Sentence: 我不会[开车]。

English Words: On the [drive] back, let's stop by a convenience stall.
Chinese Sentence: [开车]回来的路上，我们去一下便利店吧。

English Words: Let's [drive] to town.
Chinese Sentence: 我们[开车]进城吧。

English Words: He is currently [driving] on the road.
Chinese Sentence: 他正在[开车]。

English Words: Don't just talk about it, hurry up and [start doing it].
Chinese Sentence: 别光用嘴说，快动手做吧。

English Words: He assembled this model airplane himself [by hand].
Chinese Sentence: 这个航模是他自己动手组装的。

English Words: Let's talk this out peacefully, absolutely do not start [throwing hands].
Chinese Sentence: 有话好好说，千万别动手。

English Words: This is a [real/actual] check; I’m not joking.
Chinese Sentence: 这是一张实在的支票，不是在开玩笑。

English Words: He is a very [honest/sincere] person; he never tells lies to trick people.
Chinese Sentence: 他那个人很实在，从不撒谎骗人。

English Words: The sun is [really/indeed] too strong today; I don't want to go out.
Chinese Sentence: 今天的太阳实在太大了，我不想出门。

English Words: The benefits he provides to the employees are very [substantial/significant].
Chinese Sentence: 他给员工提供的福利非常实在。

English Words: His advice is very [practical/down-to-earth]; it helped me solve quite a lot of trouble.
Chinese Sentence: 他的建议非常实在，帮我解决了不少麻烦。

English Words: His [dream] is to become a doctor
Chinese Sentence: 他的理想是成为一名医生。

English Words: We finally found an [ideal] house.
Chinese Sentence: 我们终于找到了一个理想的房子。
